subject: docs: add guardrails against skipping extraction playbook process
body:
AI skipped the documented review format and merge-analysis.js workflow
despite having read the playbook. Four fixes to prevent recurrence:

1. Pre-flight checklist in Feed the Chicken section (mandatory verification)
2. Prescriptive language in Review Format ("MUST" not "like this")
3. New prohibition in CLAUDE.md against improvising extraction workflows
4. AI Lesson documenting the mistake for future sessions

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Gdr9euCdYPPbYucjAKLtaJ
